mapper.sql: id, stock_code, market, exchange_code, provider_market_code, stock_name, latest_price, change_percent, change_amount, volume, turnover_amount, amplitude, high_price, low_price, open_price, previous_close, volume_ratio, turnover_rate, pe_dynamic, pb_ratio, total_market_value, circulating_market_value, speed, five_minute_change, sixty_day_change_percent, year_to_date_change_percent, status, refreshed_at, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stock_market ( stock_code, market, exchange_code, provider_market_code, stock_name, latest_price, change_percent, change_amount, volume, turnover_amount, amplitude, high_price, low_price, open_price, previous_close, volume_ratio, turnover_rate, pe_dynamic, pb_ratio, total_market_value, circulating_market_value, speed, five_minute_change, sixty_day_change_percent, year_to_date_change_percent, status, refreshed_at ) VALUES ( #{stockCode}, #{market}, #{exchangeCode}, #{providerMarketCode}, #{stockName}, #{latestPrice}, #{changePercent}, #{changeAmount}, #{volume}, #{turnoverAmount}, #{amplitude}, #{highPrice}, #{lowPrice}, #{openPrice}, #{previousClose}, #{volumeRatio}, #{turnoverRate}, #{peDynamic}, #{pbRatio}, #{totalMarketValue}, #{circulatingMarketValue}, #{speed}, #{fiveMinuteChange}, #{sixtyDayChangePercent}, #{yearToDateChangePercent}, #{status}, #{refreshedAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE id = LAST_INSERT_ID(id), exchange_code = #{exchangeCode}, provider_market_code = #{providerMarketCode}, stock_name = #{stockName}, latest_price = #{latestPrice}, change_percent = #{changePercent}, change_amount = #{changeAmount}, volume = #{volume}, turnover_amount = #{turnoverAmount}, amplitude = #{amplitude}, high_price = #{highPrice}, low_price = #{lowPrice}, open_price = #{openPrice}, previous_close = #{previousClose}, volume_ratio = #{volumeRatio}, turnover_rate = #{turnoverRate}, pe_dynamic = #{peDynamic}, pb_ratio = #{pbRatio}, total_market_value = #{totalMarketValue}, circulating_market_value = #{circulatingMarketValue}, speed = #{speed}, five_minute_change = #{fiveMinuteChange}, sixty_day_change_percent = #{sixtyDayChangePercent}, year_to_date_change_percent = #{yearToDateChangePercent}, status = #{status}, refreshed_at = #{refreshedAt}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM stock_market WHERE CONCAT(stock_code, '#', market) IN
#{stockKey}
